sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89195" key="prosepikata/gw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσεπι-κατάγω</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰγ]</pron>, <sense id="n89195.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bring into the calculation</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:275:21" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">275.21</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
